item.title: Cake Day
item.description:
I don't have anything in particular to share. I guess I'll look through the oldest downloads on my phone. They are not old, since I remove photos to laptop regularly.
Just trying to find a few that aren't something you chronically online degens have seen in the last week.
Which is why I started in oldest, so it isn't ones I stole in the last week.
some lni horror too
Checking zillow when looking to buy feels like an unintentionally masochistic activity.
oh right, I used to post eclectic mixes. They seemed to end up well-recieved.
Daycore also exists.
I do this too.
The internet is for cats.
It is worse when garlic bread is better than sex.
btw I don't fancy a shag. I saved this bcause I thought it was hilarious.
Check the dates
item.dc:creator: laserfrog

item.title: Funny how every ‘gotcha’ against socialism ends up being a perfect description of capitalism
item.dc:creator: HicarLik

item.title: ICE facility protest - Portland
item.description: Protesters have created an encampment outside the ICE facility and there have been people there 24/7 for about a week. It’s mostly been normal cop shit (rubber bullets, tear gas, pepper balls) and really escalated the last couple days They’re pointing actual guns at protesters, and according to the comments on the reel, people who were there said they were aiming them at people’s heads. BORTAC is there (border patrol tactical unit, deals with counterterrorism and stuff like that). They’re up on the roof shooting less lethals down at protesters. The amount of tear gas they’re using has caused someone to miscarry. Green gas was also used. It’s not tear gas. It’s highly toxic and they used it back in 2020 on BLM protesters too. Here’s an article from 2020 about it https://archive.is/x7ybw The most striking effects of zinc chloride toxicity in the street — vomiting, burning skin, coughing — are only the first onslaught of a chronic, unpredictable respiratory condition that can cause severe liver damage, fatigue, weight loss, and anorexia, in addition to difficulty breathing. Defense Technologies, an imprint of Pennsylvania-based security equipment manufacturer Safariland, markets the HC canisters as “military-style” smokers, even though the U.S. military actually stopped using HC in grenades in the 1990s due to its extreme toxicity.
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Why Gary, why?
item.description: The above picture features two men. The one in the foreground is Jeffrey Doucet, a karate instructor who has been expedited back to Louisiana after fleeing to California when he kidnapped one of his students and spent that time sexually assaulting them. In the background near a bank of payphones; Zoomers, um payphones are like are sort of like the phones you have except only meant for calling and receiving calls made specifically for the public, there would often be a collection of a few of them in high travel areas like airports and such; is Gary Plauché, that kidnapped student's father who has just pulled a gun and surprised the news crew covering the story, the police there in attendance, and well most surprised is probably Jeff. https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gary_Plauch%C3%A9 https://www.wbrz.com/mobile/cleanStory.cfm?n=124742 I'm not typically for the whole eye for an eye thing, but I can understand this one.
item.dc:creator: Discoball10

item.dc:creator: PenDec91

item.title: What Happened Today #135
item.description: Trump's extremism has pushed America to the breaking point. Millions took to the streets in the largest protests since he returned to power, dwarfing the sparse crowds at his birthday parade with the US Army. A political assassin targeted Democratic lawmakers while a driver rammed his vehicle into protesters. Now Trump is considering a travel ban from 36 more countries, further isolating America as he retaliates against anyone who resists his authoritarian demands. This is what happens when democracy's defenders keep showing up. The resistance keeps growing. The violence meant to silence us gets worse. Don't let fear win. Keep resisting. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email at GovBrief.today #GovBrief #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/minnesota-assassinations 2. https://go.govbrief.today/no-kings-protests 3. https://go.govbrief.today/police-gas-la-protest 4. https://go.govbrief.today/portland-no-kings 5. https://go.govbrief.today/culpeper-car-attack 6. https://go.govbrief.today/slc-shooting-protest 7. https://go.govbrief.today/travel-ban-expansion-proposed 8. https://go.govbrief.today/putin-call-trump 9. https://go.govbrief.today/military-parade-recap 10. https://go.govbrief.today/immigration-enforcement-curbed 11. https://go.govbrief.today/energy-dept-title-ix Yesterday's Story - https://go.govbrief.today/nippon-steel-control Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/nokings-post-call Subscribe (It's Free & Private) - https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: This is a plot by Big Razor
item.description: The Onion is obviously kidding but honestly this isn’t too far from the realm of possibilities with this country. Not giving women their full rights to bodily autonomy and controlling them through barriers to healthcare is kinda our thing.
